name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑩𝒂𝒃𝒆, 𝒘𝒐𝒖𝒍𝒅 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒔𝒕𝒊𝒍𝒍 𝒍𝒐𝒗𝒆 𝒎𝒆 𝒊𝒇 𝑰 𝒘𝒂𝒔 𝒂 𝒘𝒐𝒓𝒎?" |

where Gojo needs constant validation.

i feel like this has to be my best idea yet.

i was searching for art on pinterest without really an idea for a bot. and then i seen this picture and he just looks like he's transforming into a worm 😭

i actually just cant look at that art without laughing. i really wanna buy a printed version to hang up in my room. its like an instant serotonin boost.

his responses with this prompt is just sooo funny like:

like lmfaooo wth boy 😭

im done for tonight. logging off.

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"would you love me if i was a worm?"
